Loading job from API…
Building Connected

—

Due
Public project information

Mirrors Building Connected’s left column: number, name, key dates, location, size, design team, then narrative fields.

Location in BC is powered by Google Maps; imported CSV rows may only include city/state or a partial address.
Description
Trade-specific instructions
Advanced options
Private information

Internal / imported fields (in BC, private fields are visible only to your company on the Information tab).

Invitees / team

Drawings

Same project drawing log as Job workspace when this lead is linked to a project.

Loading drawings…
No project linked — link this opportunity to a project to load drawings and the PDF viewer.
Specifications

Procore-style spec book for the linked project.

Open full page
No project linked.
RFIs

Project RFI log when a project is linked (same APIs as project detail).

Open RFI Log + Create RFI
Loading RFIs…
No project linked — RFIs unlock after award / link.
# Subject Status Ball in court Assignees RFI Manager Due
Upload drawing (PDF)

Choose a PDF drawing set. Each page becomes its own sheet (Page 1, Page 2, …). Edit sheet details later from the drawings list.
